description_long: This object is a detailed representation of a crab, featuring a broad, slightly convex carapace with a rough, textured surface. The crab's two large, prominent claws are raised and open, displaying their segmented structure and sharp pincers. Its legs are jointed and spiny, radiating outward from the body, with visible articulation and fine details on the exoskeleton. The eyes are set on short stalks at the front of the carapace, giving the crab a vigilant appearance. The coloration is a mix of pale beige, pinkish hues, and darker brown accents, especially around the claws and joints. The underside and rear of the crab are less detailed, with the main focus on the dorsal and frontal features.
description: A realistic crab with raised claws, spiny jointed legs, and a textured, beige-pink carapace. Prominent eyes on short stalks and detailed exoskeleton features are visible.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the crab's face, raised claws, and full spread of legs with detailed carapace texture.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the thickness of the claws and the crab's body depth, with legs and carapace edge visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the carapace, the segmentation of the legs, and the underside of the claws.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, similar to view 1, showing the other side of the crab's body and claws.
